productName: ThunderChief Primo's - TC Primo Blunt 1.5g - Butter - 1.5g
description: This infused indica blunt pairs Butter with a concentrate boost for a thicker, longer-lasting session and a noticeably stronger hit. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — earthy, sweet undertones, delivering settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease. Pace yourself.
